title: Help on a workflow

posts.author: Kara (Karolyn Webb)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

Pretty new to Monday but experienced PowerPlatform/sharepoint etc. user.

I have a work flow automation I am trying to build. It is mostly successful but I’m looking for advice on the best way to acheive the final step.

It is as follows:

  1. Created a Project Brief form
  2. When status is changed, it creates a new board from the template with the title and details from the form

All of this works great but I also want to pre-populate the board with some data from the form (held on the other board) - what is the best way of achieving this automatically. Happy to be directed to documentation etc.

Many thanks.
